name: Raspberry Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups fresh or frozen raspberries, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first five ingredients and stir until smooth. Fold in the raspberries.
2. Spoon the mixture into the pastry shell.
3. Bake the pie at 400°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the center is set.
4. In another bowl, combine the remaining 1/3 cup flour, brown sugar, chopped pecans, and butter. Sprinkle this over the hot pie.
5. Bake the top of the pie at 400°F for 10 minutes, or until golden. If necessary, cover the edges with aluminum foil to prevent excessive browning.
6. Garnish, if desired. Makes 1 (9-inch) pie.
